title: Celestial Power suppresses the Lightning response window

card.rawText: This card cannot be negated when played. Atk: +8. Hit: +8. SPD: +8.

plan.title: Celestial Power suppresses the Lightning response window

notes: This card cannot be negated when played, so the chain response should never happen.
